title: Origin Realms GUI Revamp
description: A resource pack that aim to revamp GUIs from the Origin Realms Server
body: ![IDK.](https://i.imgur.com/w5egL2c.png) I edited some GUIs from the server Origin Realms, right now this pack only has a few GUIs, I will work on the rest later. You’ll have to put the pack on top of everything for it to work, so you need the Server Pack Unlocker mod: https://modrinth.com/mod/server-pack-unlocker Just a render I made for the 1.1.0 update ![IDK2.](https://i.imgur.com/MqILemb.png)
